name: 86 Chaos 16.0.2 Presence Visibility and Read Saver
label: 16.0.2 Low-Cost Online Presence Visibility
notes: Shows low-cost Realtime Database online/last-online status in Staff Roster and the user Profile screen.
Keeps Message Board free of presence indicators to avoid extra live reads there.
System Administrator manual presence snapshot now treats RTDB online sessions as online even when the connection has been open longer than the snapshot window.
Adds a page-visibility read saver so Firestore live listeners pause while the app tab is hidden and resume when the tab returns.
Keeps the 16.0.1 My Schedule strict shift matching fix.
